title: Ignite Sentinel Challenge Analysis
description: Input contract for /challenge (advanced elicitation, IMP-023). Each gap is validated in code by validate_agent_gaps (shared with /annotate, /scrutinize, and the implementability probe) — every gap must cite verbatim local evidence — and is merged tagged origin: challenge. The optional pre-mortem and inverted-assumption notes feed challenge_report.md.

technique.description: The elicitation technique that surfaced the finding (e.g. pre-mortem, jtbd-forces, red-blue-team, first-principles, stakeholder-round-robin, assumption-inversion).

evidence.description: Verbatim local quote from raw input or domain context.
